title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
